productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Printed White T-shirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one ready for a trip out in this T-shirt from Gini and Jony. The print on the front adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
